name: salesforce-project
description: Salesforce DX project with Policy as Code enforcement via Azure DevOps

scripts.policy:opa: npm run policy:convert && opa eval --data policies/opa --input /tmp/metadata.json --format raw 'data.salesforce.policy.deny' | node scripts/validate/opa-exit-check.js
scripts.policy:check: npm run lint:apex && npm run lint:lwc && npm run lint:flows && npm run policy:opa && npm run policy:checkov && npm run lint:retire
scripts.deploy:validate: sf project deploy validate --source-dir force-app --api-version 62.0 --test-level RunLocalTests --wait 30
